SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH Dates AS(
SELECT
	 current_date() AS RunTime
	,concat(CAST(year(current_date()) AS VARCHAR(4)),CAST(lpad(month(current_date()), 2, '0') AS VARCHAR(2))) AS ProcessingMonth
	,CAST(year(current_date()) AS VARCHAR(4)) AS PECProgramYear
	,CAST(month(current_date()) AS VARCHAR(2)) AS Month
	,date_add(last_day(add_months(current_date(), -1)),1) AS MonthStart
	,last_day(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE)) AS MonthEnd
)
,MaxLockDown AS(
	SELECT max(FileID) AS MaxFileID
	FROM PecReportbaseLockdownParameters
	WHERE Client = upper('#clientCode')
)
,LockDownAndDates AS (
	SELECT CASE WHEN prlp.ID = 3 AND d.ProcessingMonth > prlp.LastDynamicRosterMonth THEN prlp.LastDynamicRosterMonth ELSE d.ProcessingMonth END AS RosterBeginMonth
				,*
	FROM Dates d
		JOIN PecReportbaseLockdownParameters prlp ON d.PECProgramYear = LEFT(prlp.LastDynamicRosterMonth, 4)
				AND prlp.Client = upper('#clientCode')
		JOIN MaxLockDown mld ON prlp.FileID = mld.MaxFileID
)
,EngagedMinRosterOne AS(
SELECT
	 m.practiceCode
	,MIN(m.RosterMonth) AS RosterMonth
FROM cmemberRoster m
	CROSS JOIN LockDownAndDates d
	INNER JOIN practiceTargetEngagementStatus gr
		ON LEFT(m.PracticeCode, 13) = LEFT(gr.PracticeCode, 13)
			AND upper(gr.clientCode) = upper('#clientCode')
			AND gr.PECProgramYear = d.PECProgramYear
			AND gr.participationDecision Like 'Yes%'
			AND gr.product = m.ProgramType
			AND gr.product IN('RCDI')
WHERE
	length(m.PracticeCode) = 13
	AND m.RosterMonth BETWEEN d.RosterBeginMonth AND d.ProcessingMonth
GROUP BY
	m.PracticeCode
)
,EngagedMinRosterTwo AS(
SELECT
	 m.practiceCode
	,MIN(m.RosterMonth) AS RosterMonth
FROM cmemberRoster m
	CROSS JOIN LockDownAndDates d
	INNER JOIN practiceTargetEngagementStatus gr
		ON LEFT(m.PracticeCode, 13) = LEFT(gr.PracticeCode, 13)
			AND upper(gr.clientCode) =  upper('#clientCode')
			AND gr.PECProgramYear = d.PECProgramYear
			AND gr.participationDecision Like 'Yes%'
			AND gr.product = m.ProgramType
			AND gr.product in ('RCDI')
	LEFT JOIN EngagedMinRosterOne c
		ON LEFT(m.PracticeCode, 13) = LEFT(c.PracticeCode, 13)
WHERE
	length(m.PracticeCode) > 13
	AND c.PracticeCode IS NULL
	AND m.RosterMonth BETWEEN d.RosterBeginMonth AND d.ProcessingMonth
GROUP BY m.PracticeCode
)
,EngagedMinRoster AS(
SELECT
	 practiceCode
	,RosterMonth
FROM EngagedMinRosterOne
UNION ALL
SELECT
	 practiceCode
	,RosterMonth
FROM EngagedMinRosterTwo
)
,ReportBase AS(
SELECT DISTINCT
	'#clientCode' Client
	,c.poCode
	,UPPER(c.poName) AS poName
	,m.practiceCode
	,UPPER(c.practiceName) AS practiceName
	,CASE WHEN YEAR(c.engagedDate) < d.PECProgramYear THEN 'Continuing' ELSE 'New' END AS Engagement
	,m.providerID
	,m.providerNPI
	,m.providerFirstName
	,m.providerLastName
	,m.PlanMemberID AS PlanMemberID
	,mm.DateofBirth AS MemberDOB
	,m.programType AS Market
	,PlanType AS planID
	,'' AS GroupName
	,'' AS GroupNumber
	,m.RosterMonth
	,'' AS CurrentlyActive
	,'' AS MidyearNewmemb
	,d.ProcessingMonth AS ReportPeriod
	,d.RunTime AS LoadDate
FROM cMemberRoster m
	CROSS JOIN LockDownAndDates d
	LEFT JOIN Member mm
			ON m.planMemberID = mm.PlanMemberID
	LEFT JOIN practiceTargetEngagementStatus c
			ON m.practiceCode = c.practiceCode
			AND upper(c.clientCode) = upper('#clientCode')
			AND c.PECProgramYear = d.PECProgramYear
	INNER JOIN EngagedMinRoster emr
			ON m.practiceCode = emr.practiceCode
	WHERE m.RosterMonth BETWEEN d.RosterBeginMonth AND d.ProcessingMonth
	AND m.programType='RCDI'
	AND LEFT(m.RosterMonth,4) = d.PECProgramYear
)
,DupsToKeep AS(
SELECT
	 PlanMemberID
	,Market
	,MIN(RosterMonth) AS RosterMonth
FROM ReportBase
GROUP BY
	PlanMemberID
	,Market
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
)
,ReportBaseWithoutDups AS(
SELECT
	a.Client
	,a.poCode
	,a.poName
	,a.practiceCode
	,a.practiceName
	,a.Engagement
	,a.providerID
	,a.providerNPI
	,a.providerFirstName
	,a.providerLastName
	,a.PlanMemberID
	,a.MemberDOB
	,a.Market
	,a.PlanID
	,a.GroupName
	,a.GroupNumber
	,a.RosterMonth
	,a.CurrentlyActive
	,a.MidyearNewmemb
	,a.ReportPeriod
	,a.LoadDate
FROM ReportBase a
	LEFT JOIN DupsToKeep b
		ON a.PlanMemberID = b.PlanMemberID
WHERE
b.PlanMemberID IS NULL
)
,ReportBaseWithDups AS(
SELECT
	a.Client
	,a.poCode
	,a.poName
	,a.practiceCode
	,a.practiceName
	,a.engagement
	,a.providerNPI
	,a.providerID
	,a.providerFirstName
	,a.providerLastName
	,a.planMemberID
	,a.memberDOB
	,a.market
	,a.planID
	,a.groupName
	,a.groupNumber
	,a.rosterMonth
	,a.currentlyActive
	,a.midyearNewmemb
	,a.reportPeriod
	,a.loadDate
FROM ReportBase a
	INNER JOIN DupsToKeep b
			ON a.PlanMemberID = b.PlanMemberID
			AND a.RosterMonth = b.RosterMonth
			AND a.Market = b.Market
)
,ReportBaseTwo AS(
SELECT
	Client
	,poCode
	,poName
	,practiceCode
	,practiceName
	,Engagement
	,providerID
	,providerNPI
	,providerFirstName
	,providerLastName
	,PlanMemberID
	,MemberDOB
	,Market
	,PlanID
	,GroupName
	,GroupNumber
	,RosterMonth
	,CurrentlyActive
	,MidyearNewmemb
	,ReportPeriod
	,LoadDate
FROM ReportBaseWithoutDups
UNION
SELECT
	Client
	,poCode
	,poName
	,practiceCode
	,practiceName
	,Engagement
	,providerID
	,providerNPI
	,providerFirstName
	,providerLastName
	,PlanMemberID
	,MemberDOB
	,Market
	,PlanID
	,GroupName
	,GroupNumber
	,RosterMonth
	,CurrentlyActive
	,MidyearNewmemb
	,ReportPeriod
	,LoadDate
FROM ReportBaseWithDups
)
,ReportBaseWithLockdown AS(
SELECT
	RosterMonth
	,pbt.Client
	,poCode
	,poName
	,practiceCode
	,practiceName
	,Engagement
	,providerID
	,providerNPI
	,providerFirstName
	,providerLastName
	,PlanMemberID
	,MemberDOB
	,Market
	,PlanID
	,GroupName
	,GroupNumber
	,CurrentlyActive
	,MidyearNewmemb
	,ReportPeriod
	,LoadDate
	,NULL AgeModel
	,NULL MetalLevel
	,NULL LineOfBusiness
	,NULL BusinessEntity
	,NULL MbrTargetedFlg
	,NULL Relationship
FROM ReportBaseTwo pbt
)
,ReportBaseFinal AS(
SELECT
	RosterMonth
	,pbt.Client
	,poCode
	,poName
	,practiceCode
	,practiceName
	,Engagement
	,providerID
	,providerNPI
	,providerFirstName
	,providerLastName
	,PlanMemberID
	,MemberDOB
	,Market
	,PlanID
	,GroupName
	,GroupNumber
	,CurrentlyActive
	,MidyearNewmemb
	,ReportPeriod
	,LoadDate
	,NULL AgeModel
	,NULL MetalLevel
	,NULL LineOfBusiness
	,NULL BusinessEntity
	,NULL MbrTargetedFlg
	,NULL Relationship
FROM ReportBaseWithLockDown pbt
)
,ReFormattedReportBase AS(
SELECT
	CAST(RosterMonth AS STRING) AS reportMonth
	,CAST(PlanMemberID AS STRING) AS planMemberID
	,CAST(Client AS STRING) AS clientCode
	,CAST(ReportPeriod AS STRING) AS reportPeriod
	,CAST(poCode AS STRING) AS poCode
	,CAST(poName AS STRING) AS poName
	,CAST(practiceCode AS STRING) AS practiceCode
	,CAST(practiceName AS STRING) AS practiceName
	,CAST(Market AS STRING) AS market
	,CAST(Engagement AS STRING) AS engagement
	,CAST(ProviderID AS STRING) AS providerID
	,CAST(providerNPI AS STRING) AS providerNPI
	,CAST(concat(providerLastName ," ",providerFirstName) AS STRING) AS providerName
	,CAST(PlanID AS STRING) AS planID
	,CAST(GroupName AS STRING) AS groupName
	,CAST(GroupNumber AS STRING) AS groupNumber
	,CAST(CurrentlyActive AS STRING) AS isActive
	,CAST(MidyearNewmemb AS STRING) AS isMidYearNewMember
	,CAST(LoadDate AS DATE) AS loadDate
	,CAST(AgeModel AS STRING) AS ageModel
	,CAST(MetalLevel AS STRING) AS metalLevel
	,CAST(LineOfBusiness AS STRING) AS lineOfBusiness
	,CAST(BusinessEntity AS STRING) AS businessEntity
	,CAST(MbrTargetedFlg AS STRING) AS isMemberTargeted
	,CAST(Relationship AS STRING) AS relationship
	,sha2(concat(
		IfNull(RosterMonth, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(PlanMemberID, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(Client, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(ReportPeriod, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(ProviderID, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(providerNPI, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(providerLastName, "|"),
    "|",IfNull(providerFirstName, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(poCode, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(poName, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(practiceCode, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(practiceName, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(Engagement, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(Market, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(PlanID, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(GroupName, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(GroupNumber, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(CurrentlyActive, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(MidyearNewmemb, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(LoadDate, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(AgeModel, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(MetalLevel, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(LineOfBusiness, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(BusinessEntity, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(MbrTargetedFlg, "|"),
		"|",IfNull(Relationship, "|")
		), 256
	) AS hashKey
FROM ReportBaseFinal
)
SELECT
	 reportMonth
	,planMemberID
	,clientCode
	,reportPeriod
	,poCode
	,poName
	,practiceCode
	,practiceName
	,market
	,engagement
	,providerID
	,providerNPI
	,providerName
	,groupName
	,groupNumber
	,isActive
	,isMidYearNewMember
	,loadDate
	,ageModel
	,metalLevel
	,lineOfBusiness
	,businessEntity
	,isMemberTargeted
	,relationship
	,planID
	,hashKey
FROM ReFormattedReportBase
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
SELECT 
  clientCode
 ,reportMonth
 ,planMemberID
 ,planId
FROM tempSQLScript
GROUP BY
  clientCode
 ,reportMonth
 ,planMemberID
 ,planId
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
LIMIT(3)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
WITH THIS AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
	 s.reportMonth
	,s.planMemberID
	,s.clientCode
	,s.reportPeriod
	,s.providerID
	,s.providerNPI
	,s.providerName
	,s.poCode
	,s.poName
	,s.practiceCode
	,s.practiceName
	,s.engagement
	,s.market
	,s.groupName
	,s.groupNumber
	,s.isActive
	,s.isMidYearNewMember
	,s.loadDate
	,s.ageModel
	,s.metalLevel
	,s.lineOfBusiness
	,s.businessEntity
	,s.isMemberTargeted
	,s.relationship
	,s.planID
	,s.hashKey
FROM tempSQLScript s
)
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM this) s
		ON IfNull(s.reportMonth,"|") = IfNull(t.reportMonth,"|")
		AND IfNull(s.PlanMemberId,"|") = IfNull(t.PlanMemberId,"|")
		AND IfNull(s.clientCode,"|") = IfNull(t.clientCode,"|")
		AND IfNull(s.PlanId,"|") = IfNull(t.PlanId,"|")
		AND IfNull(s.reportPeriod,"|") = IfNull(t.reportPeriod,"|")
WHEN MATCHED THEN 
UPDATE SET 
	 reportMonth = s.reportMonth
	,planMemberID = s.planMemberID
	,clientCode = s.clientCode
	,reportPeriod = s.reportPeriod
	,providerID = s.providerID
	,providerNPI = s.providerNPI
	,providerName = s.providerName
	,poCode = s.poCode
	,poName = s.poName
	,practiceCode = s.practiceCode
	,practiceName = s.practiceName
	,engagement = s.engagement
	,market = s.market
	,groupName = s.groupName
	,groupNumber = s.groupNumber
	,isActive = s.isActive
	,isMidYearNewMember = s.isMidYearNewMember
	,loadDate = s.loadDate
	,ageModel = s.ageModel
	,metalLevel = s.metalLevel
	,lineOfBusiness = s.lineOfBusiness
	,businessEntity = s.businessEntity
	,isMemberTargeted = s.isMemberTargeted
	,relationship = s.relationship
	,planID = s.planID
	,hashKey = s.hashKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
		 reportMonth
		,planMemberID
		,clientCode
		,reportPeriod
		,providerID
		,providerNPI
		,providerName
		,poCode
		,poName
		,practiceCode
		,practiceName
		,engagement
		,market
		,groupName
		,groupNumber
		,isActive
		,isMidYearNewMember
		,loadDate
		,ageModel
		,metalLevel
		,lineOfBusiness
		,businessEntity
		,isMemberTargeted
		,relationship
		,planID
		,hashKey
)
VALUES (
		 s.reportMonth
		,s.planMemberID
		,s.clientCode
		,s.reportPeriod
		,s.providerID
		,s.providerNPI
		,s.providerName
		,s.poCode
		,s.poName
		,s.practiceCode
		,s.practiceName
		,s.engagement
		,s.market
		,s.groupName
		,s.groupNumber
		,s.isActive
		,s.isMidYearNewMember
		,s.loadDate
		,s.ageModel
		,s.metalLevel
		,s.lineOfBusiness
		,s.businessEntity
		,s.isMemberTargeted
		,s.relationship
		,s.planID
		,s.hashKey
)
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE THEN DELETE
